description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Maven Packages that can be triggered manually or called by another workflow with an optional Ice version input. The workflow has two jobs: build-slice-compilers, which builds slice2java compilers for multiple platforms in a matrix, and build-maven-packages, which depends on the compilers job, downloads the compiler artifacts, sets up the environment, copies and prepares slice2java binaries, updates the Ice version if provided, builds and signs Java packages using Gradle and Maven, and uploads the resulting artifacts.
